ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic annotation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genomic feature (e.g., gene variant) */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome where the feature is located */,
  "chrom_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the feature on the chromosome */,
  "chrom_end" INTEGER /* End position of the feature on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the feature (+ or -) */,
  "shift" INTEGER /* Shift value for the feature */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location type (e.g., last, internal) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genes table */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transcripts table */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic variant */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Functional impact of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_annotations_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_annotations_chrom FOREIGN KEY ("chrom") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chrom_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chrom_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosome */,
  "assembly_id" TEXT /* ID of the genome assembly */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism to which the chromosome belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene's function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genes table */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "transcript_type" TEXT /* Type of transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic annotation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the annotation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES genomic_annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
